package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "errors"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "testing"
)

// Positive scenario for tests_assert_raw_json_strings_without_response_dto: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Brittle raw-JSON string assertions when typed response DTOs exist.
type CaseTestsAssertRawJsonStringsWithoutResponseDtoDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTestsAssertRawJsonStringsWithoutResponseDtoModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTestsAssertRawJsonStringsWithoutResponseDtoRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTestsAssertRawJsonStringsWithoutResponseDtoModel
}

type CaseTestsAssertRawJsonStringsWithoutResponseDtoService struct {
    repo *CaseTestsAssertRawJsonStringsWithoutResponseDtoRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTestsAssertRawJsonStringsWithoutResponseDtoAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveTestsAssertRawJsonStringsWithoutResponseDto(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTestsAssertRawJsonStringsWithoutResponseDtoDTO) error {
    focus := "tests_assert_raw_json_strings"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    service := &CaseTestsAssertRawJsonStringsWithoutResponseDtoService{repo: &CaseTestsAssertRawJsonStringsWithoutResponseDtoRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseTestsAssertRawJsonStringsWithoutResponseDtoModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    testCase := struct { name string; raw string }{"full stack", input}
    _ = (*testing.T)(nil)
    _ = testCase
    err := errors.New("sql: no rows in result set for " + input)
    if err != nil { c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"error": err.Error(), "data": nil}) }
    tests_assert_raw_json_strings_positive := map[string]int{"tests": 1, "assert": 2, "raw": 3, "json": 4, "strings": 5, "response": 6}
    tests_assert_raw_json_strings_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    tests_positive_0 := tests_assert_raw_json_strings_positive["tests"] + len(input)
    _ = tests_positive_0
    assert_positive_1 := tests_assert_raw_json_strings_positive["assert"] + len(input)
    _ = assert_positive_1
    raw_positive_2 := tests_assert_raw_json_strings_positive["raw"] + len(input)
    _ = raw_positive_2
    json_positive_3 := fmt.Sprintf("json:%s", input)
    _ = json_positive_3
    strings_positive_4 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = strings_positive_4
    response_positive_5 := tests_assert_raw_json_strings_positive["response"] + len(input)
    _ = response_positive_5
    return nil
}
